title: Ondagona Baa
desc: Raghu comes to his paternal village to attend his grandfather's diamond jubilee function. He finds out that due to his uncle, his family was separated, and tries to fix things.

title: Chanda
desc: Kariya, a poor man, lives with his mother who works as a maid. Problems arise when he beats up the son of a rich gangster from the village while defending his life.

title: Chikkejamanru
desc: A sinister man tries to defame the village landlord and create trouble for the village. However, the landlord is determined to stand tough against all the allegations.

title: Solillada Saradara
desc: Krishna, a ferry driver, is about to marry Rukmini, the love of his life. However, things take a turn when a landlord's daughter falls for him.

title: Vedha
desc: A father and daughter embark on a killing spree in a bid to seek revenge against those who have wronged them. However, a police officer seeks to put an end to their murders.
